label: L1/L3 geography disposition (EXPLORATORY - no frozen confirmatory rule applies)
notes: This build supports the v10 manuscript restructure. It re-examines the
unresolved L1-vs-L3 Cartesian geography at three observational levels
(per-record subsample, channel, family) and runs four blocks:
A raw geography, B controlled/residual geography, C held-out incremental
information, D mechanism stress. It reuses the frozen v2 corpus features,
and the core-magnitude baseline (tables/baseline_coremag.csv). No frozen
confirmatory decision rule covers this analysis; the retention threshold
below is a project-management rule, not a scientific criterion.

disposition_rule_frozen_before_results.1_disappears_after_controls: raw-vs-controlled collapse becomes a principal figure; raw geography interpreted as magnitude + recording
disposition_rule_frozen_before_results.2_survives_only_exact: compact exact-integer contrast in main text; extended geography to supplement; no generalization to administrative records
disposition_rule_frozen_before_results.3_survives_in_recorded: revise four-driver claim; identify surviving information; require replication across independent source families before any main-text claim
disposition_rule_frozen_before_results.4_L3_no_heldout_value: no substantive claim that L1/L3 topology is independently informative; the collapse itself may remain the result
disposition_rule_frozen_before_results.retention_threshold_status: project-management rule (no pre-existing frozen criterion applies)

per_record_sample.availability: only sources present on disk (direct path or surviving Archive zip)

exact_constructions.balanced_products: 2-4 random primes, value <= 1e12, 120 values per channel
exact_constructions.additive_controls: sums of 12 uniforms and Poisson tallies, magnitude-matched

controls_sequence: S1 digit-length residuals (dL1, dL3) against frozen E[.|d] with channel digit weights
S2 decimal-prime (c2/c5) strip: de-rounded coords (stored dL1_der,dTail_der corpus-wide; dL3_der recomputed on subsample)
S4 residue-quantization conditioning (residualize on resonance_score, log lattice_gcd)
S5 deep strip primes<=7 against core-magnitude baseline (subsample)

heldout.uncertainty: family-grouped bootstrap of pooled out-of-fold predictions, 500 resamples, 90% CI
heldout.model: sklearn HistGradientBoostingClassifier, default params, class-imbalance noted
